message.reasoning: Need to produce JSON with gym and home, each 7 days, each day list 6-10 exercises including warm-up and cool-down as exercises. Vary sets/reps/calories. Avoid heavy pronated curls, thick-grip holds. Use push-pull-legs split: Day1 push, Day2 pull, Day3 legs, repeat. Provide IDs per day start at 1. Ensure realistic calories.
